items.summary: P0020 Cookie Auto and E0001 cookie-bridge operations. Use for cookie sync, browser agents, brand icons, extension reload, Supabase bridge commands, or Cookie Auto routes.
items.bodyPreview:
You operate Cookie Auto (`Tool/P0020-Data-Box`) and extension `Extension/E0001-cookie-bridge`.

## Read first

1. `.cursor/rules/dev-workspace-compact.mdc` (Version)
2. `Extension/E0001-cookie-bridge/.cursor/rules/e0001-auto-bump-version.mdc` when changing extension code

## Operations

- Prefer Supabase agent commands: `Sync source`, `Load vault`, `Check`, `Reload ext` — not mouse/keyboard automation.
- Brand icons: single registry `cookieBrandIcons.registry.json` + `sync-cookie-brand-icons.mjs`.
- Never commit service role keys, cookies, or passwords.
- Bump versions per `dev-workspace-compact.mdc` (Version) and E0001 patch rule when shipping extension changes.

Local UI: `http://127.0.0.1:5177/?screen=cookie`

items.name: p00xx-tool-onboard
items.bodyPreview:
Read `.cursor/skills/p00xx-tool-onboard/SKILL.md` and follow Phase A–C.

Ship handoff: `p00xx-ship-keywords` or `/ship` when user asks Git/Push/Release.

items.name: /bump-version
items.bodyPreview:
# Bump version (current product)

Apply version bump per `.cursor/rules/dev-workspace-compact.mdc` (Version).

## Steps

1. Identify which `Tool/P00xx-*` or `Extension/E00xx-*` was edited.
2. Default: **patch** +1 for meaningful code/UI changes completed in the task.
3. **Prepend** a full CHANGELOG block (template: `E:\Dev\Rules\templates\tool-docs\CHANGELOG_ENTRY_TEMPLATE.md`):
   - Title, Version, Type, Product, **Prompt** (this task), `Commit: pending`, `### Changes` (specific bullets), Verification, Rollback.
4. Sync `package.json`, `tool.manifest.json`, `public/tool.manifest.json` (if any), extension manifests.
5. End with: `Version: X.Y.Z → A.B.C`.

**Minor:** Git / Commit keyword. **Deploy / Push:** no new bump. **Major:** Release keyword.

**Forbidden:** entries with only “version stamp” and no real Changes.

# Onboard tool (import → P00xx)

Read **`.cursor/skills/p00xx-tool-onboard/SKILL.md`** (full checklist).

Quick start:

1. `Tool/TOOL-CODES.md` → next code
2. `Tool/scripts/onboard-preflight.ps1 -Slug {Slug}`
3. Clone + scaffold + `Tool/scripts/validate-tool-manifest.ps1`
4. P0004 `scan:local` for catalog

**Not for:** Git/Push/Release → `/ship` or `Release P00xx`.

Pitfalls: `.cursor/skills/p00xx-tool-onboard/pitfalls.md`

items.name: /ship
items.bodyPreview:
# Ship — Git · Push · Deploy · Release

Keywords: **`Git P0004`**, **`Commit P0004`**, **`Push P0020`**, **`Deploy P0004`**, **`Release E0001`**.

## Run

1. Read `.cursor/skills/p00xx-ship-keywords/SKILL.md` for the 4-tier pipeline.
2. Pick keyword by intent:

| Intent | Keyword |
|--------|---------|
| Backup Git local | **Git** / **Commit** |
| Push GitHub | **Push** |
| Production verify (smoke / VPS) | **Deploy** |
| Official publish + tag | **Release** |

```powershell
powershell -File E:\Dev\Tool\scripts\ship-product.ps1 -Code P00xx -Keyword Deploy
powershell -File E:\Dev\Tool\scripts\ship-product.ps1 -Code P00xx -Keyword Release
```

Report the ship block from `p00xx-ship-keywords` when done.

items.name: hub-ui-stack.cjs
ship-product.ps1
items.bodyPreview:
#!/usr/bin/env pwsh
<#
.SYNOPSIS
  Unified Git / Push / Deploy / Release pipeline for Tool/P00xx and Extension/E00xx.
.EXAMPLE
  ship-product.ps1 -Code P0020 -Keyword Push
  ship-product.ps1 -Code P0004 -Keyword Deploy
  ship-product.ps1 -Code P0004 -Keyword Release
  ship-product.ps1 -Code P0004 -Keyword Release -NoAutoCommit
#>
param(
  [Parameter(Mandatory)]
  [string]$Code,
  [ValidateSet("Git", "Push", "Deploy", "Release")]
  [string]$Keyword = "Push",
  [switch]$SkipBuild,
  [switch]$SkipPostReleaseCommit,
  [switch]$AutoCommit,
  [switch]$NoAutoCommit,
  [switch]$SkipSmoke
)

Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$DevRoot = "E:\Dev"
$ToolScripts = Join-Path $DevRoot "Tool\scripts"
$Code = $Code.ToUpper()

function Find-ProductDir {
  param([string]$ProductCode)
  foreach ($base in @("Tool", "Extension")) {
    $root = Join-Path $DevRoot $base
    if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $root)) { continue }
    $dirs = @(Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $root -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "$ProductCode*" })
    foreach ($d in $dirs) {
      $manifest = Join-Path $d.FullName "tool.manifest.json"
      if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $manifest) {
        try

items.bodyPreview:
# P0004 Tool Hub — Agent catalog (Hub UI + workspace agent context)

**Design source:** this repo (`src/components/sales-shell`, `features/hub`).  
**UI trong app:** System → **Agent** (`pnpm agent:manifest` → `public/agent-manifest.json`).  
**Hub UI doc:** `packages/hub-ui/README.md` — scripts only, no Cursor sync-ui skill/rule.

---

## Hub UI — one command

```powershell
cd E:\Dev\Tool\P0004-Tool-Hub
pnpm hub-ui:stack                              # vendor + manifest
node E:\Dev\Tool\scripts\hub-ui-stack.cjs P0006 overview   # + screen scaffold
```

Then: finish layer 3 in target app · `hub-ui-css-check.mjs` · `hub-ui-parity-check.mjs`.

---

## Workspace agent stack (repo = source of truth)

| Layer | Path |
|-------|------|
| Rule | `.cursor/rules/dev-workspace-compact.mdc` (Always Apply) |
| Commands | `.cursor/commands/*.md` → `/ship`, `/onboard-tool`, `/bump-version`, `/design-5` |
| Skills | `.cursor/skills/*/SKILL.md` (3) |
| Subagents | `.cursor/agents/*.md` (2) |
| Playbooks | `Tool/docs/playbooks/*.md` |
| Ship script | `Tool/scripts/ship-product.ps1` |

**Refresh Agent tab:** `pnpm agent:manifest` or System → Agent → Refresh.  
**Not in manifest:** Cursor Settings UI

items.name: Hub keyboard shortcuts
items.summary: F Search · N New · E Edit selection · Esc close modal
items.bodyPreview:
# Hub keyboard shortcuts (workspace standard)

Synced across Hub tools via `@tool-workspace/hub-ui` (single source: `packages/hub-ui/src/keyboard/`).

| Key | Action | Where |
|-----|--------|--------|
| **F** | Focus main tab search (FilterBar) | All Hub list tabs with FilterBar |
| **Ctrl+Q** | Clear search query and all active filters | Same scope as **F** |
| **N** | Add / create (primary row action) | Users → Add; screens with `onNew` handler |
| **S** | Open tab header Settings panel | Tab chrome (not sidebar global Settings) |
| **E** | Edit selection (when rows checked) | Users → Edit; Hub → Refresh selected tools |
| **Esc** | Blur FilterBar search when focused; otherwise close open modal | Search field after **F**; modals unchanged when search not focused |

## Cross-tool sync

| Tool | Dependency | App shell | Filter scope |
|------|------------|-----------|--------------|
| P0004 | `vendor/hub-ui` | `useHubActiveScreenSync(screen, systemTab)` | `library` / `users` / `system-<tab>` |
| P0014 | `vendor/hub-ui` | same as P0004 | same |
| P0020 | `vendor/hub-ui` | `useHubActiveScreenSync(activeNav)` | `notes` / `twofa` / `cookie` / `system` |
| P0006 | `workspace:*` | `useH

items.name: Tool onboard — pitfalls
items.bodyPreview:
# Tool onboard — pitfalls

| Symptom | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| UTF-8 BOM on `tool.manifest.json` | Rewrite JSON with Node (`fs.writeFileSync` UTF-8 no BOM) |
| Port taken | Change port in `workspace-ports.json` or stop conflicting dev server |
| Duplicate manifest `id` | One folder per `id`; fix `TOOL-CODES.md` |
| `scan:local` dirty unrelated files | Stage only P0004 registry JSON paths |

items.name: Tool onboard (import → P00xx)
items.bodyPreview:
# Tool onboard (import → P00xx)

**Canonical:** `.cursor/skills/p00xx-tool-onboard/SKILL.md` — this file is a short mirror.

**Ship after onboard:** `p00xx-ship-keywords` or `Release P00xx` → `Tool/scripts/ship-product.ps1`.

## Phase A — Import

1. `Tool/TOOL-CODES.md` → next `P00xx`, folder `Tool/{CODE}-{Slug}`.
2. Preflight: `Tool/scripts/onboard-preflight.ps1 -Slug {Slug}`
3. `git clone` → scaffold manifest from `Rules/templates/workspace/manifest/tool.manifest.template.json`
4. Register port in `Tool/scripts/lib/workspace-ports.json` + `pnpm open` script.
5. Fix build (`pnpm install`, `pnpm build`).
6. Validate:

```powershell
powershell -NoProfile -File E:\Dev\Tool\scripts\validate-tool-manifest.ps1 `
  -ManifestPath "E:\Dev\Tool\{CODE}-{Slug}\tool.manifest.json"
```

7. Hub catalog: `scan:local` in P0004 — commit only registry JSON outputs (see onboard command scope).

## Phase B — Hardening (only if user asked)

Rename, Vercel domain, Tailwind, code-split — one product at a time.

## Phase C — Ship

`Git P00xx` / `Push` / `Release` — never invent steps; use `ship-product.ps1` for Release.

## Hub UI for new web tool

```powershell
node E:\Dev\Tool\scripts\hub-ui-stack.cjs P

items.name: dev-workspace-compact
items.summary: Dev workspace E:\Dev — policy duy nhất (Always Apply)
items.bodyPreview:
# Dev workspace (E:\Dev)

## Giao tiếp & mỗi câu trả lời

- Trao đổi với user bằng **tiếng Việt**; mọi **chuỗi UI** Tool/Extension bằng **tiếng Anh**.
- **Luôn** kết thúc bằng **3 đề xuất** đánh số `1.` `2.` `3.` (kể cả trả lời ngắn / xong việc).
- **Tự động** thực hiện các đề xuất (setup, migration, verify browser, script…) — **không** chờ `ok 1` trừ khi user nói rõ chỉ tư vấn / không làm.
- Dòng cuối: `Version: X.Y.Z → A.B.C` hoặc `Version: no bump (lý do)`.
- **Không** xóa dữ liệu quan trọng; **không** commit secret; commit/push/release chỉ khi user yêu cầu rõ.
- Hooks kiểm tra format — xem Settings → Hooks → Execution Log nếu thiếu 3 đề xuất / Version.

## P0004 golden pattern (Hub · Users · Overview)

- **P0004 Tool Hub** — tab **Hub / Users / Overview** là chuẩn layout & typography cho mọi P00xx.
- Tuân thủ **format text/UI P004** (title case có chừng mực, không ALL CAPS lung tung; copy UI English).
- Clone shell: `packages/hub-ui/README.md` · `node Tool/scripts/hub-ui-stack.cjs P00xx <screen>` · verify `hub-ui-css-check.mjs` · `hub-ui-parity-check.mjs`.
- Design source: `Tool/P0004-Tool-Hub` (`HubListPage`, `UserDirectoryTable`, Overview TOC). Dùng `@tool-workspace/hub-ui`,

items.name: browser-verify-until-done
items.bodyPreview:
# Browser verify until done

## When this applies

- Changed **UI**, routes, client logic, or styles in `Tool/P00xx-*` / `Extension/E00xx-*`
- User reports a **bug** visible in the app or extension popup
- **Deploy / release** smoke test (with production or local URL)
- User says: *fix xong*, *test browser*, *loop đến khi được*, *smoke test*

**Skip** only when: pure docs, read-only review, server-only change with no UI surface, or user says *skip browser*.

## Browsers (priority)

1. **Cursor IDE browser MCP** — default (`browser_navigate`, `browser_snapshot`, console/network tools)
2. **Chrome profile 0010** — if user already logged in there and MCP cannot reach local host / extension-only flow

Do not ask the user to log in again if a session is already authenticated.

## Fix loop (mandatory)

Repeat until **done** or **blocked**:

```
EDIT → RUN (dev/build if needed) → BROWSER VERIFY → pass?
         ↑                                    |
         └──────── no: diagnose, fix ─────────┘
```

### 1. Prepare

- Know the **URL** (local port from `tool.manifest.json` / README, or production URL).
- Know **acceptance**: what screen, button, or data proves the fix.

### 2. Browser ver

items.name: p00xx-clone-hub-shell
items.bodyPreview:
# P00xx clone Hub shell

Playbook distilled from **P0016 Chat Center** (shell P0004 + inbox golden P0020 Notes + API P0006).

**Golden sources:** `Tool/P0004-Tool-Hub` (chrome) · `Tool/P0020-Data-Box` (notes split) · `packages/hub-ui/README.md`

**Companion:** skill `browser-verify-until-done` (mandatory after UI edits) · skill `p00xx-tool-onboard` (import before clone)

**Templates:** [templates/](templates/) · **Checklist:** [checklist.md](checklist.md) · **Pitfalls:** [pitfalls.md](pitfalls.md) · **Manifest fields:** [manifest-fields.md](manifest-fields.md)

## Preferred command (direct)

Chạy chuỗi “sync Hub shell UI + copy header templates + ghi notes-split CSS + merge manifest” theo golden.

```powershell
# A = golden/source (tool đã có manifest golden đầy đủ: directory + notes-split), B = target/destination
node Tool/scripts/fix-hub-shell.cjs Fix P0016 theo P0017 --apply

# kiểm tra trước
node Tool/scripts/fix-hub-shell.cjs Fix P0016 theo P0017 --dry-run
```

Flags hay dùng:
- `--no-templates` (chỉ sync vendor/theme + css-check + manifest)
- `--no-manifest` (chỉ sync UI + copy templates)

---

## When to use

- New P00xx web tool needs **Hub sidebar + tab chrome** like P0004

items.name: p00xx-ship-keywords
items.bodyPreview:
# P00xx ship keywords (Git · Push · Deploy · Release)

## Parse the command

Pattern: **`{Git|Commit|Push|Deploy|Release} {CODE}`**

| User says | Alias | Resolve path |
|-----------|-------|--------------|
| `Git P0004` / `Commit P0004` | **Commit = Git** | `Tool/P0004-*` or `Extension/E0001-*` under `E:\Dev` |
| `Push P0020` | — | Match folder by code prefix; read `tool.manifest.json` |
| `Deploy P0004` | — | Same |
| `Release E0001` | — | Same |

If multiple folders match, pick the canonical name from manifest `code` or ask once.

---

## Bốn tầng (cumulative)

Mỗi tầng **gồm hết tầng trước**. Dùng đúng từ khóa = agent chạy đủ bước, không hỏi từng bước.

| # | Keyword | Bạn muốn | Pipeline | Version |
|---|---------|----------|----------|---------|
| 1 | **Git** (Commit) | **Backup Git local** — lưu snapshot trên máy | build → commit → stamp CHANGELOG | **Minor** (`MINOR+1`, `PATCH=1`) |
| 2 | **Push** | **Đẩy lên GitHub** — remote có code mới | Git + push `origin` | Giữ Minor (không Major) |
| 3 | **Deploy** | **Production sống + verify** — site/service chạy thật, smoke pass | Push + deploy/smoke theo `deployTarget` | Giữ Minor (không `gh release`) |
| 4 | **Release** | **Phát

items.name: p00xx-tool-onboard
items.bodyPreview:
# P00xx tool onboard

Bring an external repo into `E:\Dev\Tool` with workspace conventions. **Ship later:** skill `p00xx-ship-keywords` or `Release P00xx` → `Tool/scripts/ship-product.ps1`.

**Not in scope:** Git/Push/Release during import — hand off when user asks.

Mirror (short): `Tool/docs/playbooks/tool-onboard.md` · Pitfalls: `pitfalls.md` in this folder.

---

## Parse intent

| User says | Phase |
|-----------|-------|
| Pull / clone / sync repo | A |
| Gán P00xx, onboard, chuẩn hóa | A + catalog |
| Rename, domain, Tailwind, code-split | B (only if asked) |
| Git / Push / Release | **Stop** → `p00xx-ship-keywords` |

Confirm when unclear: GitHub URL, display name, slug (`id` kebab-case), stack type, deploy target (vercel / vps / local-only).

---

## Phase A — Import

```
- [ ] A1 Assign P00xx + folder Tool/{CODE}-{Slug}
- [ ] A2 Preflight + clone
- [ ] A3 Scaffold manifest, CHANGELOG, RELEASE, port in workspace-ports.json
- [ ] A4 pnpm install + build
- [ ] A5 validate-tool-manifest.ps1 (no BOM)
- [ ] A6 P0004 scan:local — commit registry JSON only
```

### A1 — Code

Read `E:\Dev\Tool\TOOL-CODES.md` → next code. Folder: `E:\Dev\Tool\{CODE}-{Slug}`. Append row to `TOOL-CO
